ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains for the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses for the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Average hours worked per week */,
  "income_class" TEXT /* Income class (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the individual works in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region of residence */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed, self-employed) */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income (e.g., salary, self-employment, investments) */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status (e.g., single, married filing jointly) */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number (encrypted for security) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_class FOREIGN KEY ("income_class") REFERENCES income_classes ("income_class_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_num FOREIGN KEY ("education_num") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_num_min"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_hours_per_week FOREIGN KEY ("hours_per_week") REFERENCES work_hours ("hours_per_week_min")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., '18-25', '26-35') */,
  "age_group_min" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the group */,
  "age_group_max" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the age group was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the age group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., 'High School', 'Bachelor’s Degree') */,
  "education_num_min" INTEGER /* Minimum number of years of education */,
  "education_num_max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of years of education */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the education level was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the education level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_classes" (
  "income_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income class */,
  "income_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the income class (e.g., '<=50K', '>50K') */,
  "income_class_min" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the class */,
  "income_class_max" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the class */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the income class was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the income class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hours category */,
  "work_hours_name" TEXT /* Name of the work hours category (e.g., 'Full-time', 'Part-time') */,
  "hours_per_week_min" INTEGER /* Minimum hours worked per week */,
  "hours_per_week_max" INTEGER /* Maximum hours worked per week */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the work hours category was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the work hours category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hours_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the individual data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version used for the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy recommendation */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text of the policy recommendation */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the recommendation is based on */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the recommendation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_recommendations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES research_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_recommendations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
